title: Agents Are Just Loops
summary: AWS Developers demonstrates building AI agents using the Strands Agents SDK with minimal code. The video covers agent fundamentals by constructing four progressively complex agents: single-tool, multi-tool with model selection, instrumented with hooks, and multi-agent orchestrators. The core agent pattern is presented as a loop where models reason, select tools, execute them, and repeat.
